title: Build Once, Sell Forever
hook_text: A house you build once and rent forever
body_text: Digital assets pay rent without the upkeep
voiceover_text: Imagine a house you build once and rent forever, except this house never needs repairs and costs almost nothing to copy. That's a digital asset, and it's the closest thing to owning property without the price tag. When you build a physical rental, you pay for materials, maintenance, and management. When you build a digital one, a video library, an online course, a piece of software, you build it once and the copies are free. The same article serves one reader or one million at no extra cost. The same course sells to a hundred people without you lifting a finger again. That's leverage with no ceiling. Most people spend their whole lives renting their time. A few learn to build things that collect rent for them. Be one of the few. Follow for more.
caption: Imagine a house you build once and rent forever, with no repairs and free copies. That's a digital asset: a course, a video library, a piece of software. Build it once and it serves one person or a million at no extra cost. Most people rent out their time; a few build things that collect rent for them. #aitools #passiveincome #financialfreedom #theleveragestack #wealthbuilding #sidehustle #aiautomation #buildingwealth
